title: Vehicle Collector Spec Poster AI
sourceTitle: Vehicle Collector Spec Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable collector vehicle specification poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable collector vehicle specification poster built around electric hypercar concept. signature elements: collector vehicle hero image, specification panels, mechanical detail sketches, timeline or cockpit inserts, and magazine-cover polish layout logic: powertrain, cockpit, aero, lighting, timeline define the supporting panels around the vehicle without reducing the hero vehicle impact annotation system: specification text, mechanical labels, timeline, and detail captions should be short and visually integrated body color: acid green. composition: 2:3 composition, poster-first hierarchy, dominant hero image, secondary detail layers, and a clean title-ready area. style: Collector automotive poster language with dramatic hero vehicle lighting, mechanical information layers, material detail, and premium magazine polish. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: electric hypercar concept as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: wet night test track defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: specific material surfaces, reflections, texture, and product-grade finish remain legible typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
imagePrompts.title: Electric Hypercar Concept Acid Green Wet Night T
